type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (06-03) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10, PM2.5 and SO2 emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx and CO emissions for 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions decreased by 13%
2) CO emissions decreased by 12%
3) PM10 emissions increased by 23%
4) PM2.5 emissions increased by 23%
5) SO2 emissions increased by 116%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Flaring volume increased from 1582.6 e3m3 to 2076.1 e3m3.
2) Added five (5) Waukesha 1,420 hp compressor engines to equipment list in 2013.
3) Increase in production for 2014.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (06-03) is reporting NOx, CO, PM10, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. This facility reported NOx and CO2 emissions for 2012. The following changes occurred from 2012 to 2013, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 160.94 to 340.90 tonnes (+112%)
2) CO emissions increased from 133.65 to 305.11 tonnes (+128%)
3) PM10 emissions increased from 0.26 to 4.97 tonnes (+1800%)
4) PM2.5 emissions increased from 0.26 to 4.97 tonnes (-(+1800%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) No flaring volume was reported in 2012, flaring volume was 1582.6 e3m3 in 2013.
2) Added five (5) Waukesha 1,420 hp compressor engines to equipment list in 2013.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (06-03) is reporting NOx and CO2 emissions for 2012. This facility reported NOx, CO2 and PM2.5 emissions for 2011. The following changes occured from 2011 to 2012, respectively:
1) NOx emissions increased from 157.88 to 160.94 tonnes (+2%)
2) CO2 emissions increased from 47.47 to 133.65 tonnes (+182%)
3) PM2.5 emissions decreased from 0.34 to 0.26 tonnes (-23%)
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Increased run time on Waukesha 1680 hp and 740 hp compressor engines
2) Updated emission factor used for Waukesha 740 hp engine; sourced from Waukesha engine specifications. Previous was general emission factor for entire engine series.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
